name: Fresh Corn Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the grated corn, flour, salt, beaten eggs, baking powder, and ground pepper.
2. Form generous tablespoonfuls of batter onto a very lightly greased nonstick pan.
3. Cook like pancakes, about 1 minute on each side, turning once when lightly browned.
4. Serve with sour cream, chutney, salsa, maple syrup, or honey.
Servings: 2 dozen fritters.
